opportunity.title: Own attention → brand outcomes
opportunity.thesis: DSPs now pitch attention pacing. Clarify Kargo’s public methodology first.
opportunity.whyItMatters: Category language Kargo helped popularize is being commoditized.
opportunity.move: One public method card + sales evidence pack vs DSP attention claims.
opportunity.expectedImpact: Keep attention narrative tied to high-impact proof.

evidence.title: IAB AdsCon: StackAdapt talk on “Attention-predicted pacing”
evidence.summary: Public roadmap language around attention-based pacing overlaps Kargo’s brand-lift / attention positioning.
evidence.rawExcerpt: Session abstract: How predicted attention scores can reallocate daily budgets without sacrificing reach goals…

competitors.name: StackAdapt
competitors.summary: Fast-growing full-funnel DSP investing heavily in AI creative tooling and self-serve mid-market expansion.

learnings.title: Attention language is being copied
learnings.lesson: Conference abstracts now pitch attention-based pacing as DSP default.
learnings.quickWin: Publish a short public method card: attention → brand outcomes for high-impact.

confidenceBreakdown.note: Public sources only. Confidence = corroboration across independent marked sources.
